另外给你一个二维整数数组 `waitCost`，其中 `waitCost[i][j]` 定义了在该单元格 **等待** 的成本。

路径始终从第 1 步进入单元格 `(0, 0)` 并支付入场花费开始。

**输出：**3

**解释：**

最佳路径为：

- 从第 1 秒开始在单元格 `(0, 0)`，进入成本为 `(0 + 1) * (0 + 1) = 1`。
- **第 1 秒**：向右移动到单元格 `(0, 1)`，进入成本为 `(0 + 1) * (1 + 1) = 2`。

因此，总成本为 `1 + 2 + 2 + 4 = 9`。

def solve(m, n, waitCost)
  dist = Array.new(m) { Array.new(n) { Array.new(2, Float::INFINITY) } }
  dist[0][0][1] = 1
  pq = [[1, 0, 0, 1]]
  directions = [[0, 1], [1, 0]]
  
  while pq.any?
    pq.sort!
    current = pq.shift
    current_cost, i, j, parity = current
    
    if i == m-1 && j == n-1
      return current_cost
    end
    
    if current_cost > dist[i][j][parity]
      next
    end
    
    if parity == 1
      directions.each do |dir|
        ni, nj = i + dir[0], j + dir[1]
        if ni < m && nj < n
          new_cost = current_cost + (ni + 1) * (nj + 1)
          if new_cost < dist[ni][nj][0]
            dist[ni][nj][0] = new_cost
            pq << [new_cost, ni, nj, 0]
          end
        end
      end
    else
      new_cost = current_cost + waitCost[i][j]
      if new_cost < dist[i][j][1]
        dist[i][j][1] = new_cost
        pq << [new_cost, i, j, 1]
      end
    end
  end
  
  -1
end

def solve(m, n, waitCost)
  dist = Array.new(m) { Array.new(n) { Array.new(2, Float::INFINITY) } }
  dist[0][0][1] = 1
  pq = [[1, 0, 0, 1]]
  directions = [[0, 1], [1, 0]]
  
  while pq.any?
    pq.sort!
    current = pq.shift
    current_cost, i, j, parity = current
    
    if i == m-1 && j == n-1
      return current_cost
    end
    
    if current_cost > dist[i][j][parity]
      next
    end
    
    if parity == 1
      directions.each do |dir|
        ni, nj = i + dir[0], j + dir[1]
        if ni < m && nj < n
          new_cost = current_cost + (ni + 1) * (nj + 1)
          if new_cost < dist[ni][nj][0]
            dist[ni][nj][0] = new_cost
            pq << [new_cost, ni, nj, 0]
          end
        end
      end

      new_cost = current_cost + waitCost[i][j]
      if new_cost < dist[i][j][1]
        dist[i][j][1] = new_cost
        pq << [new_cost, i, j, 1]
      end
    end
  end
  
  -1
end
